content.en:
Ye Tian became the owner of the island, so he naturally had to give an island.

At present, there are only three islands on Fengya Island that do not have an island owner, although it is also a treasure land, but there is nothing on it, and it still needs to be arranged and built on Fengya Island before it can be handed over to Ye Tian as an island station.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian picked it and chose one of the islands.

"That's it, it's going to be called the Endless Island!"

Ye Tian said.

After that, the Lord of the Wind Tooth personally arranged the formation for Ye Tian, and Ye Tian himself also participated in it.

After a lot of materials were consumed, the Endless Island was laid out.

The palaces are located on it, but it is a pity that there is only Ye Tian alone on the endless island now.

......

The Lord of the Wind Fangs and the Lord of the Ice and Rain are in front of the four Origin Ascending Realms.

Ye Tian stood here.

"Lord of Endless, you have become the owner of the island, and I have to tell you about some of the treatment that belongs to the island owner. "Lord of the Wind Fangs.

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

He wants to become the owner of the island, not just for face, but mainly for treatment.

"First of all, the resource treasure industry!" the Lord of the Wind Tooth waved his hand, and a map appeared, on which the location of countless treasure lands was recorded.

"We have a lot of treasure land on Fengya Island, and these locations are all where each island can obtain some resource treasure land, which is also a steady stream of resources. You can choose from a hundred resource treasure lands, and in the future, the resources born from these resource treasure lands will be from the endless island. "

"These resource treasures are all hidden with formations, and there is no Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to guard them, you'd better keep it secret, don't tell other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, otherwise if it's exposed, you will have to send someone to garrison it later, then it's not worth it." "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian chose a hundred resource treasure lands, and it was decided in this way.

These resources are nothing, most of them are ordinary resources, they don't help Ye Tian much, and they just provide resources for the other side-level geniuses who later joined the Endless Island.

Ye Tian is not for this resource.

Then.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth said, "Every island owner can obtain a treasure that will help improve the origin rules of the other side, which is not as good as the abyss fruit on the other side, but the value will not be low. "

Wow!

A golden leaf appeared in his hand.

"This is the Origin Gold Leaf of the Other Shore, from the Origin Gold Tree of the Other Shore. The Origin Golden Tree on the other side is the most precious opportunity for our Fengya Island, and its leaves can assist in comprehending the origin rules of the other side, and it will be helpful to impact the origin rules of the other side of the ninety percent. "

"This piece of the Origin Golden Leaf of the Other Shore can be used for you to assist in the comprehension of the Ten Thousand Ancient Eras, you can take it, I hope you can use it to break the shackles and raise the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the realm of ninety percent. "

Ye Tian took over this piece of the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side, and he was in a good mood.

He felt that with the fact that he now had many other side level ancestral endowments, his talent had soared, and he could quickly comprehend the qualifications of the other side's origin rules, with the help of this piece of other shore origin gold leaf, he could almost 100% break the shackles and raise the other side's origin rules to the ninety percent realm.

"The Lord of Qingyun should have also obtained the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side, but there is a high probability that they did not succeed in breaking through. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Wind Fangs gave them other treatments, such as more inheritance secrets were open to him, and the authority was higher.

......

Endless Island.

Ye Tian came here and lived in his palace.

Now, the island belongs to him, and there are many treasures on it, and many resources are born all the time.

"I can let my son enter here to cultivate. "

Ye Tian muttered.

With his current status, he can directly call the shots and let Ye Xingchen come over, and he only needs to talk to the other island owners.

The Realm of Blood, the Sacred Pavilion of the Terrans.

Ye Tian informed Ye Xingchen to come back.

Soon, Ye Xingchen came back from a certain territory.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen shouted respectfully.

"Son, I have become the owner of a sub-island of Fengya Island, and I am ready to let you join Fengya Island!" Ye Tian said.

Ye Xingchen naturally knew what the sub-island owner of Fengya Island represented, and he was immediately shocked.

"Father, you are really amazing!"

Without saying a word, he agreed directly.

Followed by.

Ye Tian took Ye Xingchen to Fengya Island and sent him to Fengya Island.

That's it.

Ye Xingchen became a member of Wind Tooth Island and joined his Endless Island.

The years that followed.

Ye Xingchen practiced silently on Fengya Island and enjoyed the many benefits and treatment given to him by Ye Tian.

And after Ye Tian also entered the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, he used the Origin Golden Leaf of the Other Shore to cultivate and comprehend the Origin Rules of the Other Side, and strive to break the shackles as soon as possible.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

A thousand primeval eras!

Two thousand primeval eras!

Three thousand primeval eras!

Before you know it, eight thousand primeval years have passed.

At this time.

The Origin Golden Leaf on the other side was about to be consumed, and Ye Tian had finally broken the shackles.

Rumble!!!!

His other side origin rules have stepped from the eighty percent nine realm to the ninety percent realm, and this breakthrough, the other side origin has improved a lot, and the other side origin rules are also a lot stronger.

He originally thought that the Ninety Percent Origin Rule was only a little stronger than the Eighty Percent Nine Shore Origin Rule, but it turned out to be a qualitative improvement.

And his other origin is also skyrocketing.

He went to test it and found that his other side origin had reached the level of 1.2 million.

Ye Tian knew very well that the 1 million Origin of the Other Shore was just a minimum requirement for impacting the Origin Upper Realm, and it was too likely to fail if he really used such a Origin Origin to impact the Origin Upper Realm.

"It is said that the other side of the origin rule of the Lord of the White Capital has reached the realm of ninety percent and two, and the other side of the origin is more than 1.5 million, even so, the breakthrough still failed, I must improve the other side of the origin even more, so that there is hope for a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After the other side of the origin rules broke through to the ninety percent realm, he originally thought that he would be faster to comprehend the other side of the origin rules, but the result was still extremely difficult, as if he had fallen into a bottleneck again.

Subsequently.

As soon as he chatted with the other island owners, he knew that after ninety percent of the Origin Rule Realm on the other side, every point of the realm was a shackle.

The realm of ninety percent to the realm of ninety percent is a shackle, and the realm of ninety percent one to ninety percent is also a shackle.

Like the few top sub-island owners of the Lord of the White Capital, they are all in the ninety percent realm, ninety percent one realm, or ninety percent two realm, and it is difficult to continue to break through, and they fail to attack the Origin Upper Realm again and again.

Like the original Lord of Ice and Rain, it is really too demonic, the origin rules of the other side have reached the realm of ninety percent and three, the complete golden body of the other side, the top of the other side of the supreme art, all of them have reached the realm of peak attainment, and they have also obtained a great opportunity, so they have succeeded in breaking through!
